title: Summer
why_this_song: Summer by Calvin Harris (2014) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "When I met you in the summer"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "To my heartbeat's sound"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "To my heartbeat's sound"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "We fell in love"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "As the leaves turned brown"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "summer" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "summer" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "yeah" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When I met you in the summer

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Summer", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Summer", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Summer" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Summer" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Summer" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Summer", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?
